summary: All cross-layer consistency checks pass. Assembly layers match timing tracks, interaction elements cover all tool slots A/B/C, continuity entry_transition (500ms) exactly matches timing entry_transition_ms, timing constraints satisfied (background loops full duration, tools enter after transition at 800/1200/1600ms, mission text 600-5100ms in first 42%, checkpoint text 9500-12000ms in last 21%, total 12000ms within range), storyboard beats span [0, 12000] with full coverage, and all assembly positions within [0,100].
